title: Verify Currency Normalization
description: Verify that all currency inputs (New Transaction, Add Account, Reconciliation) follow the same decimal-based style with a '$ ' prefix and bold formatting.
steps: Navigate to 'New Transaction' and verify amount entry style
Navigate to 'Settings' -> 'Manage Accounts' -> '+' and verify amount entry style matches
Navigate to 'Dashboard' -> Select Account -> 'Reconcile' and verify amount entry style matches
Enter a decimal value (e.g., 12.50) in each and verify no 'cents' labels are present
